channel.title: Fireworks AI
channel.description: Fireworks AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: MiniMax M3 is live: long context + native multimodality at 1/20th the price
item.description: MiniMax M3 is now available on Fireworks AI with Day-0 support — delivering the first open-weight model to combine frontier-level coding, native multimodal understanding (images and video), and a 1M-token context window in a single model. Powered by MiniMax Sparse Attention (MSA), M3 achieves up to 15× faster decoding at long context compared to M2.7, with per-token compute dropping to 1/20th at 1M tokens. On coding and agentic benchmarks, M3 leads all open-source models and surpasses…
